title: Name's Custom Splash Text
description: Over 500 new pieces of splash text for the title screen.
body:
Add about 1000 pieces of splash text to your Minecraft title screen!

This is a very simple resource pack that adds new pieces of splash text-- Including some from other versions of Minecraft (including Bedrock) and even some removed ones!

No splash text that is in the original game (as of 1.19.4) is removed, making for a total of 1,446 pieces of splash text!
